sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.JobDefi.Description: The name of the bias job definition. The name must be unique within an AWS Region in the AWS account.

sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.JobReso.Description: Identifies the resources to deploy for a monitoring job.

sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.ModelBi.Description: Configures the model bias job to run a specified Docker container image.
The baseline configuration for a model bias job.
Inputs for the model bias job.
The output configuration for monitoring jobs.

sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.Network.Description: Networking options for a model bias job.

sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.RoleArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that Amazon SageMaker can assume to perform tasks on your behalf.

sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.Stoppin.Description: A time limit for how long the monitoring job is allowed to run before stopping.

sagemaker.modelbiasjobdefinition.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
